mapper.insert: INSERT INTO game_guide_spider (task_id, title, content, source_url, create_time) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{sourceUrl}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, content, source_url, create_time FROM game_guide_spider ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id, title, content, source_url, create_time FROM game_guide_spider
(title ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT id, title, content, source_url, create_time FROM game_guide_spider WHERE source_url = #{sourceUrl} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, task_id, title, content, source_url, create_time FROM game_guide_spider ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
